title: 11Pcs Pots and Pans Set, Nonstick Cookware Sets, White Granite Induction Cookware Non Stick Cooking Set w/Frying Pans & Saucepans
features: ✔ Complete 11-Piece Cookware Set – Includes everything you need for versatile cooking: 8" & 9.5" frying pans, 3 QT stock pot with lid, 2 QT & 1.5 QT saucepans with lids, plus a ladle, spatula, and tongs.
✔ Durable & Safe Nonstick Coating – PFOA- and PFOS-free granite nonstick surface ensures effortless food release and easy cleanup while being safe for your family.
✔ Induction-Compatible & Even Heating – Works on all stovetops, including induction, gas, electric, and ceramic, with fast, uniform heat distribution for perfect cooking results.
✔ Sturdy & Ergonomic Design – Features heat-resistant handles for a secure grip and tempered glass lids to monitor cooking without losing heat or moisture.
✔ Stylish & Modern Aesthetic – Sleek white granite finish adds a touch of elegance to any kitchen while resisting scratches and stains for long-lasting beauty.
✔ Perfect Gift for Home Chefs – An ideal kitchen upgrade for beginners and cooking enthusiasts alike, combining functionality, durability, and style in one set.
✔ Upgrade your cooking experience with SHEUMNT’s high-quality nonstick cookware set—designed for performance, safety, and convenience!
